title: Korak 13

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import secrets
import string

# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

# Combine all characters
all_characters = letters + digits + symbols
challengeFiles.seed:
import secrets
import string

# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

# Combine all characters
all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

tests.text: Trebalo bi da objavite funkciju sa imenom generate_password.
Izjava za import treba da ostane van funkcije.
Četiri deklaracije za varijable treba da se prebace unutar funkcije.
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => assert(runPython(`
  func = _Node(_code).find_function('generate_password')
  vars = ['letters', 'digits', 'symbols', 'all_characters']
  func.find_variable('letters').is_equivalent('letters = string.ascii_letters') and \\
  func.find_variable('digits').is_equivalent('digits = string.digits') and \\
  func.find_variable('symbols').is_equivalent('symbols = string.punctuation') and \\
  func.find_variable('all_characters').is_equivalent('all_characters = letters + digits + symbols') and \\
  all(not _Node(_code).has_variable(var) for var in vars)
  `))
})

description: Deklariši funkciju generate_password i napiši sav svoj kod, osim linija import, unutar tela funkcije.
